code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import AdminSection from'../components/AdminSection';import'./AdminCustomers.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminCustomers=()=>{const[customers,setCustomers]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const fetchCustomers=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/customers');if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch customers');const data=await response.json();setCustomers(data);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchCustomers();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AdminSection,{title:"Customers",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-customers-list",children:[loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading..."}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error}),!loading&&!error&&customers.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No customers found."}),!loading&&!error&&customers.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"admin-customers-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Customer ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Phone"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Address"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:customers.map(c=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:c.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:c.customer_id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:c.phone_number}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:c.address})]},c.id))})]})]})});};export default AdminCustomers;
